mongoMissing: MONGODB_URI is not configured. Set it in .env before running `audithex ui`.
sessionSecretMissing: AUDITHEX_UI_SESSION_SECRET is not configured (>=32 chars). Set it in .env before running `audithex ui`.
webMissing: Could not locate the web app at {{path}}. Did you check out the apps/web directory?
nextMissing: Next.js binary not found inside apps/web/node_modules. Run `yarn install` first.
notBuilt: apps/web has not been built. Run `yarn workspace @audithex/web run build` or pass `--dev` to launch the dev server.

flags.port: Port for the local web UI (default: 7777)
flags.dev: Run `next dev` (hot reload) instead of `next start`
flags.noOpen: Do not open the URL in a browser automatically
